category_sources: source_facts.description says OpenGL Extension Wrangler Library; official GLEW homepage describes a C/C++ OpenGL extension loading library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glew; official homepage title expands it as The OpenGL Extension Wrangler Library (GLEW).
docs_sources: Official GLEW site provides Usage, Building, and Installation documentation pages.
repo_sources: Official GLEW homepage links GitHub and gives git clone https://github.com/nigels-com/glew.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GLEW homepage describes C/C++ OpenGL extension loading and supported OpenGL extensions.
